headline: Plug-and-Play 90W PoE Solution Streamlines Industrial IoT Deployments
summary: Microchip’s industrial-grade Power over Ethernet (PoE) midspans enable device deployment wherever needed, without any switch replacements or upgradesCHANDLER, Ariz., July 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As industrial environments become more automated and connected, demand for Power over Ethernet is rising to enable industrial applications by delivering reliable power and data over a single cable, simplifying deployment and scalability.
